titleStmt.title: SII 19.372: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 372. (A.R. No. 113 of 1914.) TIRUVEṞUMBŪR, TIRUCHIRAPALLI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT. ON THE WEST WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, PIPĪLIKĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This is an unfinished inscription, probably of the reign of Uttama-Chōḷa. It records an endowment of land made by one Śembiyaṉ-Vēdivēḷāṉ, after purchasing it from the sabhā to provide for the requirements of offerings during the mid-day service in the temple of Tiruveṟumbiyūr-Āḷvār Tribhuvanasundarar at Śrīkaṇṭhachaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya on the southern bank of the river. Among its boundaries are mentioned two pieces of land, one endowed for a perpetual lamp and the other for the maintenance of a person singing the Tiruppadiyam hymns, in the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakecaripanmakki yāṇṭu 10 5Āvatu teṉkarai brahmadeyam śrīkaṇṭha ccaturvetimaṅkalattu tiruveṟu
mpiyūrāḷvār tiribhuvaṉasun=taraṟku cantrātittaval Uccampotai san=tiyil tiruvami rtu ceyya vaiytta Arici Irunā
ḻiyum kaṟiyamirtoṉṟukkum neyyamir taraippiṭikkum tayiramirtu Urikkum Aṭaipa kāyamirtu Iraṇṭum veṟṟilai Eṭṭukkummāka vaiytta ni
lamāvatu Ittevaṟku cempiyaṉ veytiveḷāṉ sabhaiyārpakkal vilaikoṇṭu kiṭa nilattil caṅkarappāṭiyāṉ māṟantūtuvaṉāṉa civapattaṉ macakkivaitta nilattukku kiḻ pāṟkellai Ittevar tiruviḷakkup
puṟattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai tiruppatiyam pāṭuvār nilattukku vaṭakkum mel kellai Eṟumpiyūrā rellaikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kuṉṟappoḻaṉ macakkivaitta tiruviḷakkuc ceykkut teṟkum mivvicaitta perunāṉkel
laiyuḷakappaṭṭa nilamuṇṇi
lamoḻiviṉṟiThe inscription stops here.
Digital edition of SII 19.372 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
